name: M-Pesa
description: Mobile money service that enables users to send and receive money via mobile phones, greatly improving financial inclusion in East Africa.

name: Flutterwave
description: Provides payment infrastructure for businesses across Africa, enabling seamless online and offline transactions.

name: Andela
description: Connects African software engineers with global remote jobs and helps build long-term engineering teams.

name: Zipline
description: Uses autonomous drones to deliver medical supplies and vaccines to remote areas, reducing delivery times and saving lives.

name: Jumia
description: A pan-African e-commerce platform offering goods, services, and logistics solutions across several African nations.

name: Farmcrowdy
description: Connects smallholder farmers with investors and resources to improve yields, market access, and profitability.

name: Chipper Cash
description: Enables free and instant cross-border money transfers in Africa, offering seamless peer-to-peer payments.

name: Kobo360
description: A digital logistics platform connecting truckers with businesses for efficient cargo transport and real-time tracking.

name: Paystack
description: Helps African businesses accept online payments via cards, bank transfers, and mobile money. Acquired by Stripe.

name: Solar Sister
description: Empowers women entrepreneurs to distribute clean energy products like solar lamps in rural communities.

name: SafeBoda
description: Motorcycle ride-hailing app that emphasizes safety, training, and convenience in urban transport across East Africa.

name: AltSchool Africa
